name: Queen's Road Capital Investment Ltd.
description: Queen’s Road Capital Investment Ltd. (QRC) is a dividend-paying, leading financier to the global resource sector. The company operates as a resource-focused investment firm, acquiring and holding securities in both privately held and publicly traded resource companies. Its investment strategy focuses on long-term capital appreciation, primarily through convertible debt securities and investments in resource projects that are in advanced stages of development or production. By providing capital to companies with assets in safe jurisdictions, QRC aims to generate attractive returns for its shareholders while maintaining a diversified portfolio of high-quality resource assets.
